.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update Apache License URL from http to https for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to follow standard convention (java.io before java.net).
Reformat string concatenation to single line for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL constant.

private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/"
        + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.after:

        "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat string assignment to single line for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH constant.
Reformat string assignment to single line for MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH constant.
Add space after 'if' keyword in conditional statement for style consistency.
Add space after 'if' keyword in null check conditional for style consistency.
Add space after 'if' keyword in directory existence check for style consistency.
Add space after 'if' keyword in mkdirs failure check for style consistency.
Reformat System.out.println call to single line for error message.
Reformat anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for indentation consistency.
Remove trailing whitespace/newline at end of file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the Generated annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed or deprecated in newer Jakarta EE versions; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on the target JDK/runtime.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add import for CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers.
Refactor log message string concatenation to use Java 13+ text blocks for better readability.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles to ensure meaningful log output.
Add JHipster generator needle comments to the ApplicationProperties class to allow the code generator to inject configuration properties.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Wrap single string argument in array syntax for @EnableJpaRepositories annotation.
Replace the Hibernate 5 Jackson module with the Jakarta EE namespace variant to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The original Hibernate5Module relies on javax.persistence annotations which are removed or incompatible in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using the non-Jakarta module causes runtime ClassNotFound or NoClassDefFoundError for javax classes.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer required or compatible with the current dependency set.
Reorder method parameters to place the custom @LiquibaseDataSource provider after standard properties, likely to align with Spring Boot 3.x dependency injection expectations or code style.
Replace the deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to adapt to the Liquibase API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method setLabels(String) was removed or deprecated in favor of setLabelFilter(String) in recent Liquibase versions; calling the old method causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes compilation errors or runtime failures in newer Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent API with .and() to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The .and() method and legacy fluent API are removed in Spring Security 6; code using them fails to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated authorizeRequests() with authorizeHttpRequests() to match Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: authorizeRequests() is removed in Spring Security 6; calling it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers() with requestMatchers() in authorization rules to comply with Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers() is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove configure(WebSecurity web) override and move ignored paths to csrf ignoring or permitAll, as WebSecurity customization is handled differently in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed; overriding configure(WebSecurity) is no longer valid in the new bean-based configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler/FailureHandler with inline lambda handlers returning HTTP status codes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom handlers were likely tied to deprecated APIs or removed dependencies; inline handlers are the standard approach in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler with HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler to align with Spring Security 6 logout handling.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom logout handler was likely tied to deprecated APIs; standard handler is required for compatibility.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace featurePolicy() with permissionsPolicy() to comply with modern browser standards and Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy() is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace frameOptions().deny() with frameOptions().sameOrigin() to align with modern security best practices and Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: frameOptions().deny() is deprecated; sameOrigin() is the recommended approach in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace problemSupport exception handling with HttpStatusEntryPoint for authentication and access denied scenarios.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SecurityProblemSupport is removed or deprecated; standard Spring Security exception handling is required.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler to fix CSRF token handling in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CSRF token handling changed in Spring Security 6; without this, CSRF tokens may not be correctly resolved.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace CorsFilter and CsrfFilter addFilterBefore with addFilterAfter for SpaWebFilter and CookieCsrfFilter.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Filter ordering and types changed in Spring Security 6; using old filter classes or ordering causes runtime errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused imports and dependencies related to deprecated Spring Security APIs.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Unused imports cause compilation warnings or errors if the classes are removed in newer versions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add new imports required for Spring Security 6 configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: New classes are required for the updated configuration; missing imports cause compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify constructor by removing unused dependencies (CorsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport).
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Unused dependencies cause compilation errors if the classes are removed or changed.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove deprecated AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler, AjaxAuthenticationFailureHandler, and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler bean definitions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: These beans are no longer used and may cause compilation errors if the classes are removed.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update content security policy to use dynamic configuration from JHipsterProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Hardcoded CSP is less flexible; dynamic configuration is preferred in modern JHipster applications.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update authorization rules to include new paths and adjust existing ones for modern application structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: New paths (e.g., /v3/api-docs/**) need to be secured; old paths may no longer be relevant.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Change websocket authorization from permitAll to authenticated to improve security.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Permitting all access to websocket endpoints is a security risk; requiring authentication is safer.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor static resource location and path mappings to use file extensions and broader classpath roots instead of specific directory prefixes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: protected static final String[] RESOURCE_LOCATIONS = new String[] { "classpath:/static/app/", "classpath:/static/content/", "classpath:/static/i18n/" }; protected static final String[] RESOURCE_PATHS = new String[] { "/app/*", "/content/*", "/i18n/*" };
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: protected static final String[] RESOURCE_LOCATIONS = new String[] { "classpath:/static/", "classpath:/static/content/", "classpath:/static/i18n/" }; protected static final String[] RESOURCE_PATHS = new String[] { "/*.js", "/*.css", "/*.svg", "/*.png", "*.ico", "/content/**", "/i18n/*" };

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3, causing compile errors due to missing packages.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for MediaType which is no longer referenced in the class.
Remove unused import for UnsupportedEncodingException as the try-catch block handling it was removed.
Remove unused import for java.util.* as specific collections are no longer used or handled differently.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
if (server instanceof ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) {
            ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory servletWebServer = (ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) server;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify URL decoding by using StandardCharsets.UTF_8 directly, removing the try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException which is unnecessary for UTF-8.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security CORS handling.
Remove registration of deprecated Swagger v2 endpoints from CORS configuration.
Add registration for Swagger UI v3 endpoint to CORS configuration.
